name: 復仇清算大爽點（賣掉家業+囚禁養父）
name_en: Revenge Payoff (selling the family empire + imprisoning the patriarch)
description: 女主用養父教她的手段反噬養父——賣掉鄭家、囚禁繼子、清算同黨，每一步都是十五年隱忍的回報。觀眾積累了大量對養父的仇恨，此刻集中釋放，極度解氣。

examples.drama_title: 【王奕然💕谭盐盐】九年後再重逢，她以自己為餌展開復仇，京圈太子爺明知是局卻甘願淪陷！ #甜宠  #drama  #复仇
examples.excerpt: I sold the Zhen family to the Su family for two billion. → ZhenGuoZhou, when that time comes, you'll be my prisoner. → Everything you did to me, I'll return it all to you. → Go on, cry some more. I love hearing losers whine.
